zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Langley於1335年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾明日香時，她的父親Geoffrey De Saye II30歲，母親Mary de Langley49歲。她和Sir John Trillow MP至少有2個女兒。她去世於1369年11月1日在英國格盧斯特斯爾莫雷頓 在 馬希享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾哈斯特萊頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Langley于1335年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾明日香时，她的父亲Geoffrey De Saye II30岁，母亲Mary de Langley49岁。她和Sir John Trillow MP至少有2个女儿。她去世于1369年11月1日在英国格盧斯特斯爾莫雷頓 在 馬希享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾哈斯特萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Langley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Langley was born in 1335, in Langley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey De Saye II, was 30 and her mother, Mary de Langley, was 49. She had at least 2 daughters with Sir John Trillow MP. She died on 1 November 1369, in Moreton in Marsh, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Chastleton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Langley est née en 1335, à Langley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey De Saye II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mary de Langley, avait 49 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Sir John Trillow MP. Elle est décédée le 1 novembre 1369, à Moreton in Marsh, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Chastleton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Langley 1335 in Langley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey De Saye II 30 und ihre Mutter Mary de Langley 49. Sie hatte mit Sir John Trillow MP mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. November 1369 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Moreton in Marsh, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Chastleton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Langley è nata il nel 1335 nel Langley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Geoffrey De Saye II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mary de Langley, aveva 49 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Sir John Trillow MP. Morì il 1 novembre 1369, nel Moreton in Marsh, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Chastleton, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Langleyが1335年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアラングリーで生まれた時，父Geoffrey De Saye IIは30歳，母Mary de Langleyは49歳であった。彼女はSir John Trillow MPとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1369年11月1日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアモーエトン イン マーッシュで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチャストレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Langley(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 랭글리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey De Saye II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Langley(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Trillow MP(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 11월 1일 영국 그루스스터실르 모레턴 인 마시에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 차스틀레턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Langley nasceu em 1335, em Langley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey De Saye II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Langley, tinha 49 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Sir John Trillow MP. Ela faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1369, em Moreton in Marsh, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Chastleton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Langley родилась в 1335 г. в местности лангли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffrey De Saye II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Langley, 49. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Sir John Trillow MP. Она умерла 1 ноября 1369 г. в местности моретон ин марш, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности частлетон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Langley nació en 1335, en Langley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey De Saye II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mary de Langley, tenía 49 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Sir John Trillow MP. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1369, en Moreton in Marsh, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Chastleton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
